title: 💌 Hello, my love
body: Just opened this to tell you — you make every single day better. Never forget that.

title: ❤️ I was thinking about you
body: I hope you smiled today. If not, know that I'm smiling because of you right now.

title: ⭐ New story added!
body: Check out the new story I uploaded — "Our First Trip Together". Made it just for you.
